meaning: n.远的驻扎地,分部办事处
examples: The outstation of Beijing is the Marketing Department, the main job of it is saling and service.
Our headquarters is located at Jincheng, Shanxi province. It has two outstation: the outstation of Beijing and the outstation of Shenzhen.
"It would be wonderful if the gallery trustees were to lend appropriate paintings to Auckland Castle and establish an outstation for northeast eng-land," he said.
The incident occurred at the Gumarrirnbang outstation, about 500km (300 miles) east of Darwin, the capital of the Northern Territory.
